title: Evangelion unit 123 ect and souls
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion unit 1,2,3 ect and souls.             Quote Post by closet nerd » Fri Jul 08, 2011 7:45 am This topic has already been discussed, but I don't know if any one has mentioned this. As suggested by many, the eva units need a soul. Whether this had to be the pilot's mother's soul is still disputable. In EoE Asuka "discovers" the secret of the AT field. Im to lazy to trawl threw the internets to look for the exact quote, but she says something like "I get it, the secret of the at field! You've always been there mother, protecting me...". If Im remembering the line correctly, this would suggest that Asukas mother soul is in unite 2 not her remains as previously suggested. This is so because it is the soul that creates the AT field, and the evas' souls or conciseness is suppressed, hence the dramatic power up when the evas go berserker. However, I don't believe it needs to be the pilot's mother's soul that is in the evas. In 2.0 Asuka pilots the test eva. But wait, her mother soul is already in unit 2. As for splitting the soul... well dang it this isn't Harry Potter its Evangelion so lets leave that out of the picture. Not only is Asuka's mother's soul already in unit 2, Mari polited unit 2 just fine and her mother's soul is defiantly not in unit 2. Though I don't disputed the mountain of evidence for the need for be a human soul in the evas, I don't believe its needs to be their mother's. It just so happens for unit one and two that it is their mother's souls. There is another possibility however, that it has already been proven that this is all wrong, and Im not up to date with things. Meaning I've just made a total idiot of myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 7:51 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by closet nerd » Fri Jul 08, 2011 8:05 am Ya I guess so. Not sure why they deviated from that though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 08, 2011 11:34 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: So far Rebuild has been puzzling regarding who can pilot what and why when compared to the original.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 11:42 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Jul 08, 2011 12:47 pm Like everyone says, Rebuild isn't canon to the series. The C.I. makes it clear that Rei and Unit-00 are the only exception to the "mother's soul" rule: A unit called a core is used to eliminate any discrepancies in the joining of Eva, the body of a god, with that of a human being's soul. The soul of the pilot's mother, which is placed within the core, acts as a medium and makes piloting possible. Due to difficulties encountered in the development of Eva-00, the core's system is poorly constructed, and the Eva falls behind in performance capacity as a result. Another reason for this is that Eva-00's pilot, Rei, does not have a mother.

[]:             Quote Post by closet nerd » Fri Jul 08, 2011 3:02 pm It's true that we never actually see Asuka successfully pilot Eva-03 in Rebuild[/quote] True but they wouldn't even try to get her to pilot the eva if they knew it wouldn't work in the first place. and Ya I realize the rebuild has diffidently deviated from the part of NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 08, 2011 6:58 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: All I meant was that there's simply no comparable depiction in the original.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 08, 2011 10:20 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Sat Jul 09, 2011 8:02 pm closet nerd wrote: Ya I guess so. Not sure why they deviated from that though.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 09, 2011 8:28 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Hyper: Many of the things that Ritsuko and Misato say they can do in the series, like have Rei pilot Eva-01 or other stuff, simply aren't shown, or when attempted they fail completely.

[]:             Quote Post by SaVaGe » Wed Jul 20, 2011 2:08 pm The pilot synchronization has never really been cut and dry if you ask me. I was under the impression that the dummy plug had the ability to work with any eva, but Eva unit 01 more or less caught onto to it later in episode 19 when she rejected it. But I guess some of these things will never be answered. Especially since Rebuild only complicates it further.
